sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8483" key="a)nerei/dw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνερείδω</orth>, <sense id="n8483.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prop up, rest</tr_> a thing <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ πρόπσωπον τῇ χειρί</foreign> dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
